text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp begins, and Gold Ship is hyped to
the max for this big adventure—complete with
sleepovers and hijinks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But even the mighty must fall... She exhausts herself and falls asleep en route. The beach is right there! Get up, Gold Ship!
